title: glycine hispida
intro: Glycine hispida, also known as soybean or Chinese soybean, is a legume plant native to East Asia that is widely cultivated for its edible seeds. The medicinal properties of Glycine hispida include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Glycine hispida include improved digestion, reduced risk of certain cancers, and enhanced immune function, making it a valuable addition to a healthy diet. Glycine hispida can be prepared into various herbal products, such as soybean extracts, isoflavone supplements, and fermented soybean products like miso and tempeh.
